message:
fix: persist interrupted status in metadata when agent is aborted

Capture the AbortSignal reference before the try block so the finally
block can detect interruption even though interrupt() replaces the
AbortController. The agent catches AbortError internally and doesn't
rethrow, so checking signal.aborted is the only reliable detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
